subcodes.first_line: O thou servant who art content with the decree of God! In truth, contentment is the greatest gift of the Blessed Beauty, but the realization of this attribute, which is the most exalted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده راضی بقضاء حقیقت رضاء اعظم موهبت جمال ابهیست ولی تحقق این صفت که اعظم
subcodes.subjects: @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
